articles.title: Top Crypto Analyst Forecasts Big Move for Binance Coin (BNB) on Bitcoin (BTC) Chart – Here’s the Outlook
articles.description: Popular analyst Jason Pizzino says Binance Coin (BNB), the utility token of the world’s largest crypto exchange, is likely headed for a trend reversal on the Bitcoin (BTC) chart. articles.description: The leading crypto analytics firm Santiment says one metric they track is signaling a bullish turn in the market based on historical performance.
